name: enigmagent
description: Encrypted local vault for AI agents. Resolves {{PLACEHOLDER}} secret references in tool call parameters at execution time — secret values never reach the LLM.
author: agnuxo1

host.description: EnigmAgent REST API host. Never change to 0.0.0.0 — the vault must not be exposed to the network.

strictMode.description: If true, any unresolvable {{PLACEHOLDER}} blocks the tool call with an error. Recommended for production.

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds when contacting the vault server.

externalProcess.description: The EnigmAgent vault server must be started separately before using this plugin.
